relations.evidence: nivolumab combined with ipilimumab resulted in longer progression-free survival
ipilimumab at a dose of 3 mg per kilogram every 3 weeks for four doses
Among patients with advanced melanoma, significantly longer overall survival occurred with combination therapy with nivolumab plus ipilimumab or with nivolumab alone than with ipilimumab alone
